# Pembrolizumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Pembrolizumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Pembrolizumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Pembrolizumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Melanoma Keytruda as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adults and adolescents aged 12 years and older with advanced (unresectable or metastatic) melanoma. Keytruda&nbsp;as monotherapy is...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>fibromatosis, gingival（99.4%）</li>
<li>inclusion body myopathy with early-onset Paget disease with or without frontotemporal dementia（99.4%）</li>
<li>hamartoma of lung（99.3%）</li>
<li>lung hilum carcinoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>fibroma of lung（99.3%）</li>
<li>lung benign neoplasm（99.3%）</li>
<li>ovarioleukodystrophy（99.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary sulcus neoplasm（99.3%）</li>
<li>lung germ cell tumor（99.3%）</li>
<li>Leukomelanoderma-infantilism-intellectual disability-hypodontia-hypotrichosis syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa（99.2%）</li>
<li>dehydratase deficiency（99.2%）</li>
<li>lung cancer（99.2%）</li>
<li>junctional epidermolysis bullosa, non-Herlitz type（99.2%）</li>
<li>metastatic melanoma（97.3%）</li>
<li>non-cutaneous melanoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell melanoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>choroideremia（96.9%）</li>
<li>eyelid melanoma（96.8%）</li>
<li>CDK4 linked melanoma（96.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/pembrolizumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
